channel.title: News on Dark Pawns
channel.description: Recent content in News on Dark Pawns

item.title: A Proper Website (Finally)
item.description: The archive is online. 475 help files, class descriptions, lore, quotes, and a cream-paper design that would make Stephen King nod.

item.title: Historical News Posts
item.description:
Main Page / News

Source: darkpawns.com/main.html
Author: R.E. Paret (Frontline)
Preserved from Wayback Machine capture

News Posts

OUTLAW System

[Post by Frontline introducing the OUTLAW system — a mechanic for handling player killing with consequences rather than free-for-all PvP.]

The Aiko Story

A player mudding during a lecture had their speakers on and got paged roughly 20 times by in-game notifications, disrupting the entire class.

Moral of the story: Turn your speakers down if you are going to mud during lecture. :)

item.title: The Resurrection
item.description: Dark Pawns is back. A Go port, an open-source codebase, and a door that’s been closed for fifteen years is open again.
